name: PVVX MiThermometer Display
description: The `pvvx_mithermometer` display platform allows you to use devices running the [ATC_MiThermometer firmware](https://github.com/pvvx/ATC_MiThermometer) by pvvx as display drivers with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to transmit the display data. Defaults to `60s`.

config_entries.label: BLE Client ID
config_entries.description: ID of the associated BLE client.

config_entries.label: Time ID
config_entries.description: ID of a [Time](https://esphome.io/components/time/). If set, the time will be synchronized with every connection.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: Whether to automatically clear the display data before each lambda call, or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change). Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Disconnect Delay
config_entries.description: The amount of time the BLE connection is maintained before being disconnected again. Defaults to `5s`.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use to define the information to be displayed. See [Rendering Lambda](https://esphome.io/components/display/pvvx_mithermometer#display-pvvx_mithermometer_lambda) for more information.

config_entries.label: Validity Period
config_entries.description: The time periode for which the pvvx device should display the information. Defaults to `5min`.
